name: Magi Magistratus
summary: Magical law investigators and enforcers operating across houses to pursue misconduct and arcane irregularity.
motive: Keep dangerous or illicit magic within legible boundaries and preserve Shirsh authority over magical investigations.
power_relations: Linked to House Shirsh; may clash with Roaz, Mimolot, or private magical actors over jurisdiction
visible_membership_base: Magical magistrates, investigators, evidence scribes, celestial specialists.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The deeper the investigation goes, the more the faction risks becoming a political weapon instead of a neutral safeguard.
